JSON schemas for defining Pebble application projects, attributes, data types, file types, project types, and resource types.


## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: JSON schema for defining a Pebble application project.
- **[attributes.json](attributes.json.md)**: JSON schema for defining valid attributes in Pebble projects, including app keys and resources.
- **[data_types.json](data_types.json.md)**: JSON schema for complex data types in Pebble projects, including integers and string arrays.
- **[file_types.json](file_types.json.md)**: JSON schema for Pebble project and appinfo JSON files, defining properties and required fields.
- **[package.json](package.json.md)**: Defines the JSON schema for a Pebble application project.
- **[project_types.json](project_types.json.md)**: JSON schema for defining valid Pebble project types including native-app, rocky-app, and package.
- **[resource_types.json](resource_types.json.md)**: JSON schema for defining valid resource types in Pebble projects.
